text.title: TDD with Red and Green in Separate Agents Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to apply the test-tdd-red-green-split-agents methodology end-to-end. Decision-gates surface stops when inputs do not pass.

step.name: wire-two-skills
step.action: Author both SKILL files with disjoint tool whitelists.

step.name: orchestrator-handoff
step.action: Orchestrator invokes RED with AC; captures the failing test diff + runner output.
step.output: RED state observed in CI log.
step.decision-gate: If RED does not produce a failing test, retry; if 3x fail, escalate to human.

step.name: invoke-green
step.action: Orchestrator invokes GREEN with only the failure context.

step.name: observe-green
step.action: Run the test suite; assert green; record both transitions.
step.decision-gate: If still red, escalate (do not loop > 3 times).

step.name: merge-on-recorded-transition
step.action: Open PR only when the orchestrator's transition log shows RED→GREEN.
